summary: Iteration 110 - i18n namespace split and DE/FR translations testing. All features PASS. Namespace structure verified (common, auth, dealer, admin in tr/de/fr folders). Route preload rules correctly implemented. Language switcher visible by default. DealerOverview and DealerReports pages show correct translations for TR/DE/FR with no remaining Turkish text in non-TR modes.

issues: Hydration warning: <tr> cannot be child of <span>, <span> cannot be child of <tbody> - cosmetic issue, not blocking

namespace_split_structure.description: Namespace files correctly structured in locales/{lang}/{namespace}.json format

route_preload_rules.description: resolveRouteNamespaces function correctly maps routes to namespaces

t_function_namespace_resolution.description: inferNamespaceFromKey correctly resolves auth.*, dealer.*, admin.* to respective namespaces, others to common

language_switcher_visibility.description: Language switcher visible by default in DealerLayoutV2 even when config missing

TR.title: Raporlar
TR.subtitle: Performans, paket ve doping raporlarını tek ekrandan takip edin.

DE.title: Berichte
DE.subtitle: Verfolgen Sie Leistungs-, Paket- und Dopingberichte auf einem einzigen Bildschirm.

FR.title: Rapports
FR.subtitle: Suivez les rapports de performance, de forfait et de dopings sur un seul écran.

critical_code_review_comments: LanguageContext namespace implementation is solid - uses dynamic imports for lazy loading
Route preload rules in resolveRouteNamespaces function work correctly: common+auth for login routes, common+dealer for dealer routes, common+admin for admin routes
DealerLayoutV2 language_switcher fallback logic works - visible by default with info logs when config missing
All dealer.overview.* and dealer.reports.* keys are properly translated in DE and FR namespaces
Minor: DealerReports has HTML nesting hydration warnings (span inside tbody) - should be fixed but not blocking
context_for_next_testing_agent: i18n namespace split fully verified: locales/{tr,de,fr}/{common,auth,dealer,admin}.json structure. Route preload: /login|register|verify-email->common+auth, /dealer/*->common+dealer, /admin/*->common+admin, others->common. Language switcher in DealerLayoutV2 visible by default via hasCorporateBlock fallback. All dealer page translations (overview, reports) confirmed working for TR/DE/FR. Legacy monolith files (tr.json, de.json, fr.json) exist but are marked deprecated with no code imports.
